creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Hi,

see https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=208584

As the maintainer of squid has no solution I raise a ticket here. Trying to update squid to 3.5.17_1 brought up the issue again and uninstalling libressl, upgrading ports and then installing again (required e.g. openntpd) is not really user friendly.
